The '''Andaran system''',<ref name="TSoF">''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''</ref> or '''Andara system''',<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|30|Andara}}</ref> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] and [[Ieria]].

{{System-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]'' {{1st}}
